rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies key conceptual issues and proposes well-supported reframing, demonstrating a strong grasp of the core concepts.
rationale.R1.2: The critique thoroughly examines logical inconsistencies and offers detailed fixes, ensuring end-to-end consistency.
